---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement for SpecSeyal
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? What's the pain point or gap in the
current workflow that prompted this request? (Describe the "why" before the
"what" — link to a related issue or discussion if one exists.)

## Proposed change

Describe the change you'd like to see. Be as concrete as possible — new
flags/commands, new artifact types, changed behavior, etc.

## Affected pipeline phase / extension

Which part of SpecSeyal does this touch? Check all that apply and/or name the
specific extension directory.

- [ ] Pipeline phase: `specify`
- [ ] Pipeline phase: `clarify`
- [ ] Pipeline phase: `plan`
- [ ] Pipeline phase: `council`
- [ ] Pipeline phase: `tasks`
- [ ] Pipeline phase: `analyze`
- [ ] Pipeline phase: `categorize`
- [ ] Pipeline phase: `agents`
- [ ] Pipeline phase: `parallel-implement`
- [ ] Pipeline phase: `complete`
- [ ] Pipeline phase: `testing`
- [ ] Extension: `extensions/graphify/`
- [ ] Extension: `extensions/council/`
- [ ] Extension: `extensions/workforce/`
- [ ] Extension: `extensions/git/`
- [ ] Extension: `extensions/testing/`
- [ ] Extension: `extensions/deck-render/`
- [ ] Something else (describe below)

<!--
If none of the above fit, name the phase or extension directory directly.
-->

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why did you rule them out (or why
is this the preferred option)?

## Additional context

Anything else that would help — mockups, links to related specs under
`specs/`, or references to the design docs in `docs/`.
